SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.automation

Class DefaultWriteValidators

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.automation.DefaultWriteValidators
public final class DefaultWriteValidators extends Object
Container of WriteValidator implementations that ship with NeqSim. Each inner class targets a specific equipment class and performs a small set of inexpensive, physically meaningful checks against the proposed write.

These validators are deliberately conservative: they reject only writes that are unambiguously unphysical (negative pressures, efficiencies outside [0,1], valve openings outside [0,100]) and emit WARNING-level results for values that are merely unusual (for example outlet pressure below the current inlet pressure on a compressor). Hard hardware-specific limits (surge, choke, MAOP) should be added by users via project-specific validators registered against the same WriteValidatorRegistry.

Version:
1.0
Author:
Even Solbraa

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private static double
    readStreamPressureBara(StreamInterface stream)
    Reads the current pressure of a stream in bara, returning Double.NaN when the stream or its thermo system is not initialised.
    private static double
    readStreamTemperatureK(StreamInterface stream)
    Reads the current temperature of a stream in kelvin, returning Double.NaN when the stream or its thermo system is not initialised.
    private static double
    toBara(double value, String unit)
    Converts a pressure value to bara from one of the units accepted by NeqSim's stream API.
    private static double
    toKelvin(double value, String unit)
    Converts a temperature value to kelvin from one of the units accepted by NeqSim's stream API.

    • DefaultWriteValidators

      private DefaultWriteValidators()

  • Method Details

    • readStreamPressureBara

      private static double readStreamPressureBara(StreamInterface stream)
      Reads the current pressure of a stream in bara, returning Double.NaN when the stream or its thermo system is not initialised.
      Parameters:
      stream - the stream to interrogate
      Returns:
      the pressure in bara, or NaN when unavailable

    • readStreamTemperatureK

      private static double readStreamTemperatureK(StreamInterface stream)
      Reads the current temperature of a stream in kelvin, returning Double.NaN when the stream or its thermo system is not initialised.
      Parameters:
      stream - the stream to interrogate
      Returns:
      the temperature in K, or NaN when unavailable

    • toBara

      private static double toBara(double value, String unit)
      Converts a pressure value to bara from one of the units accepted by NeqSim's stream API. Returns value unchanged when unit is null/empty/unrecognised.
      Parameters:
      value - the pressure value
      unit - the unit of measure (case-insensitive)
      Returns:
      the pressure in bara on a best-effort basis

    • toKelvin

      private static double toKelvin(double value, String unit)
      Converts a temperature value to kelvin from one of the units accepted by NeqSim's stream API. Returns value unchanged when unit is null/empty/unrecognised.
      Parameters:
      value - the temperature value
      unit - the unit of measure (case-insensitive)
      Returns:
      the temperature in K on a best-effort basis
